auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Accredible API key sent in the Authorization header as Token token=<API key>. Create or view API keys from API Management in Accredible: https://help.accredible.com/s/article/how-do-i-find-my-integration-api-key.

actions.name: create_credential
actions.description: Create one Accredible credential using JSON recipient and group fields.

anyOf.description: A numeric Accredible ID.
A string Accredible ID.

recipient.id.description: An Accredible ID represented as either a number or string.

recipient.meta_data.description: Provider-defined metadata object passed through to Accredible.

custom_attributes.description: Provider-defined metadata object passed through to Accredible.

issued_on.description: A date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format.

expired_on.description: A date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format.

complete.description: Whether the credential should be marked complete.

private.description: Whether Accredible should create the credential as private.

approve.description: Whether Accredible should approve the credential.

allow_supplemental_evidence.description: Whether supplemental evidence is allowed for the credential.

allow_supplemental_references.description: Whether supplemental references are allowed for the credential.

meta_data.description: Provider-defined metadata object passed through to Accredible.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating one Accredible credential.

id.description: The credential ID as a string.

anyOf.description: The credential name.
The credential description.
Whether Accredible marks the credential complete.
The credential issue date returned by Accredible.
The credential expiry date returned by Accredible.
The Accredible group ID when returned.
The Accredible group name when returned.
The public credential URL when returned.
The encoded credential ID when returned.
Whether the credential is private.
The Accredible recipient ID when returned.
The recipient name.
The recipient email address.
The recipient metadata returned by Accredible.
Normalized Accredible recipient details.

raw.description: The raw credential object returned by Accredible.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating one Accredible credential.

actions.name: delete_credential
actions.description: Delete one Accredible credential by credential ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting one Accredible credential.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

id.description: The credential ID as a string.

anyOf.description: The credential name.
The credential description.
Whether Accredible marks the credential complete.
The credential issue date returned by Accredible.
The credential expiry date returned by Accredible.
The Accredible group ID when returned.
The Accredible group name when returned.
The public credential URL when returned.
The encoded credential ID when returned.
Whether the credential is private.
The Accredible recipient ID when returned.
The recipient name.
The recipient email address.
The recipient metadata returned by Accredible.
Normalized Accredible recipient details.

raw.description: The raw credential object returned by Accredible.

anyOf.description: Normalized Accredible credential details.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when deleting one Accredible credential.

actions.name: get_credential
actions.description: Get one Accredible credential by credential ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one Accredible credential.

id.description: The credential ID as a string.

anyOf.description: The credential name.
The credential description.
Whether Accredible marks the credential complete.
The credential issue date returned by Accredible.
The credential expiry date returned by Accredible.
The Accredible group ID when returned.
The Accredible group name when returned.
The public credential URL when returned.
The encoded credential ID when returned.
Whether the credential is private.
The Accredible recipient ID when returned.
The recipient name.
The recipient email address.
The recipient metadata returned by Accredible.
Normalized Accredible recipient details.

raw.description: The raw credential object returned by Accredible.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when reading one Accredible credential.

actions.name: get_group
actions.description: Get one Accredible credential group by group ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one Accredible group.

anyOf.description: The group name.
The group course name.
The group course description.
The group language code.
The associated design name.
The Accredible department ID when returned.

raw.description: The raw group object returned by Accredible.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when reading one Accredible group.

A string Accredible ID.

group_id.description: An Accredible ID represented as either a number or string.

email.description: The recipient email address to filter credentials by.

anyOf.description: A numeric Accredible ID.
A string Accredible ID.

start_updated_date.description: A date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_updated_date.description: A date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format.

page_size.description: The number of results to request from Accredible.

page.description: The page number to request from Accredible.
